title: MHRA Real-World Evidence Scientific Dialogue Programme
body: "The MHRA data strategy sets out an ambition to promote data-driven innovation and early access to innovative products through real-world evidence (RWE) and proactive approaches to safety surveillance.  In support of this, we are launching a pilot RWE Scientific Dialogue Programme in 2025. This initiative is designed to help innovators refine their evidence generation strategies while providing clear guidance on regulatory expectations.  "
